CSS-Thing.name: CSS Playground
CSS-Thing.desc: A collection of fun CSS+JS experiments. Basically things I found cool and tried to replicate using my own knowledge.

Bubbles.name: Bubble Clock
Bubbles.desc: A way to tell the time with (almost) physically accurate collisions.

Undyne.name: AR Undyne Simulator
Undyne.desc: Shield your heart from a barrage of homing arrows using inputs from your camera. Heavily inspired by Toby Fox's Undertale. (Might be a bit janky, doesn't work on every system)

Tripp3r.name: Tripp3r
Tripp3r.desc: Finished prototype of a navigation app for a Dutch railway company. Includes detailed route descriptions and an interactive map.

Twitter.name: Twitter UX Review Poster
Twitter.desc:
Twitter's a rather cool app, what can I say?
This was pre⁠-⁠Elon Musk, though.

Eyes.name: They're Always Watching
Eyes.desc: An exercise in interactive programming. The eyes follow your cursor and squint when you poke at them.
